noticias.titulo: Marshall Financial Group Establishes Position in SPDR Bridgewater All Weather ETF, According to Recent SEC Filing
noticias.resumen: The SPDR Bridgewater All Weather ETF (ALLW) allocates across equities, bonds, and commodities using a risk-balanced framework tied to different economic conditions. Its multi-asset structure can lead to more balanced outcomes from traditional portfol

noticias.titulo: Einhorn prioritizes capital preservation, warns of downside risks
noticias.resumen: Investing.com -- Greenlight Capital's David Einhorn said he is focusing on capital protection as markets rally on geopolitical optimism, warning that investors may be underestimating potential downside risks.

noticias.titulo: S&P 500 Closes in on New High as Stocks Rally
